name: Japan Municipality Housing Vacancy 2003-2023
temporal_coverage: 2003, 2008, 2013, 2018, 2023 (Housing and Land Survey years; no municipality-level table exists for 1998)
geographic_coverage: Nationwide municipalities tabulated by the Housing and Land Survey (a sample survey; small municipalities are not broken out every year). Station bridge is Greater Tokyo only.
next_update_expected: 2029 (next Housing and Land Survey is 2028; results publish ~2029)
license: CC BY 4.0 (data) + MIT (pipeline code) — see LICENSE-DATA.txt and ../LICENSE
sources: Housing and Land Survey (Statistics Bureau of Japan) via e-Stat — vacancy counts
Soumu 全国地方公共団体コード / 改正一覧表 — codes, kana, mergers
GSI (Geospatial Information Authority of Japan) Address Search — municipality coordinates
Japan Station Master (this repo) — station bridge
notes: total_dwellings/vacant_total/vacant_other are official published counts, verbatim. vacancy_rate is computed (e-Stat publishes no municipality-level rate). Designated cities appear as their wards.
